details.test: Task 1: Register for evening online June Bible study (2 adults)
Task 2: $25 monthly donation to Holocaust Survivor Outreach (credit card)
Task 3: Add 3 Jewish feasts books (<$20, rating >=4) to cart
Task 4: Subscribe to Weekly Israel Updates + Monthly Teaching Articles
Task 5: Submit prayer request for peace in Jerusalem with follow-up
Task 6: Add 4-part Romans English series by lead pastor to Watch Later
Task 7: Find congregation near 90001 with Friday evening service and favorite it
Task 8: Schedule 7-day Messianic prophecies devotional next Monday and add to calendar
Task 9: Add qualifying gift bundle (<$60, >=3 booklets) to cart
